description: Analysis spec for neurology clinics and practices specializing in brain and nervous system disorders

categories.label: Group Practice
categories.description: Multiple neurologists, one or more locations

categories.label: Hospital Department
categories.description: Neurology department or clinic within a hospital

categories.label: Directory/Aggregator
categories.description: Website listing multiple clinics (not an actual clinic)

categories.label: Other
categories.description: Not a neurology clinic (unrelated business, general hospital page, etc.)

clinic_name.description: Official name of the neurology clinic or practice

services.description: List of neurology services offered (e.g., ['EEG', 'EMG', 'Botox for migraines', 'stroke care', 'epilepsy treatment'])

questions.question: Is this a hospital or a neurology department/clinic within a hospital?
Is this clinic or hospital affiliated with a university or medical school (e.g., Harvard, NYU, UCLA)?
